title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited:
Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited!
